layer3_inference: Operators likely running pump diagnostics during wait period
rejection_reason: FLAGGED classification (2 assumptions) combined with zero supporting data. No diagnostic activity appears in any available telemetry or operator log. Per burden of proof Step 2, inferences with no supporting data are stripped from scoring entirely. While the inference is plausible from an incentive standpoint, plausibility without data is not evidence per LZ-CC-001.
